title: CheyTac M200 Pack for Vic's Point Blank
description: CheyTac M200 Pack for Vic's Point Blank
body:
## **CheyTac M200 Pack for Vic's Point Blank**

Adds CheyTac M200 to Vic's Point Blank mod.

**How to install?**

```
1. Files > Download latest version of "CheyTac M200 Pack"
2. Copy the ZIP file and Paste to 'C:\Users\username\curseforge\minecraft\Instances\Pointblank\pointblank\'
3. Enjoy it
```
**Required mod : Vic's Point Blank // v1.5.8**


Special thanks to **TheScepticBlock**

Take a look at his mod too!

[https://modrinth.com/datapack/cyberpunk-2077-guns-for-vics-point-blank](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cyberpunk-2077-guns-for-vics-point-blank)
[https://modrinth.com/datapack/quality-of-life-features-for-vics-point-blank](https://modrinth.com/datapack/quality-of-life-features-for-vics-point-blank)
